title: ensure_account failure at startup silently continues; later payments fail with opaque error
description: If ensure_account(PAYMENT_ACCOUNT) fails at startup (e.g., DB locked, migration incomplete), the warn\! is logged and chat proceeds. The first payment request then hits next_diversifier which calls bail\!('account X not found; call ensure_account() first'). That error propagates to generate_fresh_address as PaymentAction::Unknown{reason: 'wallet error'}, which the payer receives — no actionable text for the user. The fix: if ensure_account fails, set wallet_fvks = None and print a user-visible warning so the session-start failure is associated with the cause.
